pkgmetadata.longdescription: Inflectionbuild status_.. build status image httpstravis-ci.orgjpvanhalinflection.svgbranchmaster alt Build Status.. _build status httptravis-ci.orgjpvanhalinflectionInflection is a string transformation library. It singularizes and pluralizesEnglish words, and transforms strings from CamelCase to underscored string.Inflection is a port of Ruby on Rails_ inflector_ to Python... _Ruby on Rails httprubyonrails.org.. _inflector httpapi.rubyonrails.orgclassesActiveSupportInflector.htmlResources---------- Documentation httpsinflection.readthedocs.io_- Issue Tracker httpgithub.comjpvanhalinflectionissues_- Code httpgithub.comjpvanhalinflection_- Development Version httpgithub.comjpvanhalinflectionzipballmastereggInflection-dev_
